output.summary: This single malt whisky from the Bruichladdich distillery on Islay has been super heavily peated to 137.3ppm. results.title: Review #27 - Bruichladdich Octomore 13.1 — Me, My Wife & Whisky
results.description: The first of three 2022 Octomores, the 13.1 is peated to 137.3 ppm and aged in ex-bourbon casks.

results.title: Bruichladdich Distillery launches 13th annual Octomore series — Dramface
results.description: The full Octomore 13 series, including the 13.1, 13.2, and 13.3, is available online at bruichladdich.com and in specialist whisky retailers from 5 October 2022.
